translated: Yeah.
It's so good.
And next is Airi Momoi.
Here is the trained version.
This outfit is similar to the one Honoka was wearing earlier,
but the skirt part is slightly different. Airi has flowers spread out like a pannier,
and it's just so cute.
I can't stop looking at it.
The droplets scattered around her make it look like the rain just stopped.
That feeling really reminds me of the story.
And here is the untrained art.
This was in the story too, but Airi really is
always worried about Shizuku Hinomori.
She's always asking,
"Are you okay?"
Since Shizuku tends to keep things to herself,
Airi is always there to check on her.
Seriously.
Without Airi, the Shizuku we know today wouldn't exist.
Even back in the theater days, Airi encouraged her so much during her time in Q-T,
so you can really see the bond between these two.
And then we have Haruka Kiritani.
The untrained art.
Wow.
Look at this little frog getting startled.
Isn't this expression just the cutest?
She's landing right on a leaf.
It's great.
Haruka's outfit has a bit of orange mixed with the red, which is also super cute.
